ogTitle: Sassafras vs Sawmill Settlement: Climate Safety

heading: Sassafras vs Sawmill Settlement — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sassafras, Victoria and Sawmill Settlement, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sassafras has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Sawmill Settlement (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sassafras or Sawmill Settlement safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sassafras has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Sawmill Settlement scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sassafras scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Sawmill Settlement scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sassafras or Sawmill Settlement?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sassafras has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
